# Telemetry selectors report (1d)
# args: {__name__="e2etelemetry:etcd_multi_def:max"}
# Results depend on the queried Prometheus instance and may differ elsewhere.
selectors:
  - selector: '{__name__="e2etelemetry:etcd_multi_def:max"}'
    metrics:
      - name: e2etelemetry:etcd_multi_def:max
        peak_series: N
        value_range: V
        recording_rule:
          file: RULEFILE
          expr: max(etcd_server_has_leader{job="etcd"})
          tree: |-
            └── etcd_server_has_leader{job="etcd"}
                  <job: etcd> <value_range: V> <peak_series: N>
    failing_checks:
      count: 3
      messages:
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:etcd_multi_def:max" is defined in CMO, it should probably live in the owning component operator
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:etcd_multi_def:max" has 2 definitions in Prometheus, the report only shows one, the dependency tree, checks, and stats may be incorrect
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:etcd_multi_def:max" uses the same source metrics as alert "etcdNoLeader", ALERTS is already forwarded to telemetry so this metric may be redundant
